title: Astrocraft Lite
description: Adds real life stars and constellations.
body:
## Astrocraft Lite

Adds real life stars and constellations. Stars are also colored.

This is a simplified version of Astrocraft, with most of its features removed for better compatibility and performance. It does not add planets, sky rotation, or anything other than stars.

---

### Before and After: The Crux
![Vanilla Stars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7194a0699384280918933f283d1c8e7f25216f_0.webp)
![The Crux and two bright stars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3258c8432a25f405334cd144a2e3e404f03d350_0.webp)

### Before and After: Orion
![Vanilla Stars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed82397b2c080296b9ec05bdcce706f16cd11ad9_0.webp)
![Orion and Sirius](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a49cf6c660aafb6046cc23c4fae4d1e296bda996_0.webp)

### Before and After: Big Dipper & Little Dipper
![Vanilla Stars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8935847686189162779c60bd1a2f528ee7910351_0.webp)
![Big Dipper & Little Dipper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8086b1b46e93ed9bbdd15e65c4375f74e4f1eadb_0.webp)

---

Resource Packs can edit the mod's stars: _assets/astrocraft_lite/astrocraft_lite/stars.json_
